Headline: #62 Archer Temporary Northbound Reroute near Archer/California
ShortDescription: Northbound #62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted via Archer, Kedzie, 47th, Western Blvd. and Archer due to street blockage near Archer/California.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted via Archer, Kedzie, 47th, Western Blvd. and Archer, then resume their normal route.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Archer/California.

(Revised)

Headline: O'Hare-bound Blue Line Service Delayed near Damen/Milwaukee
ShortDescription: O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Damen/Milwaukee due to a door problem on a train. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare-bound Blue Line trains are standing near Damen/Milwaukee due to a door problem on a train.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
